summary: Iteration 100: EchoAi³ Stress Test Engine + 12 Departments Ops Pulse. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED (100%). All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Ops Pulse expanded from 7 to 12 departments - all verified
Stress test engine handles 1,154 ops/sec with EchoAi³ analysis in 21ms
Auto-actions system generates all 3 types: auto_order, commissary_pull, approval_prompt
Mega-stress endpoint correctly calculates 195 ops for multiplier=5 (5*39=195)
seed_data_creation: Stress tests create test data in MongoDB (reservations, orders, tickets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 100 tested new EchoAi³ Stress Test Engine and expanded 12-department Ops Pulse. All endpoints working: GET /api/echoai3/ops-pulse/analyze (12 departments: rooms, food_beverage, concierge, engineering, spa, financial, purchasing, inventory_depletion, banquets, commissary, approvals, receiving), POST /api/echoai3/stress/run (configurable stress test), POST /api/echoai3/stress/mega-stress (multiplier-based stress), GET /api/echoai3/stress/history. Auto-actions system generates auto_order, commissary_pull, approval_prompt types. System handles 1,154 ops/sec with EchoAi³ analysis in 21ms.
